label: Room part crate
description: A room part that places loot crates. Inherits from RoomPartDef.

crateDef.label: Crate def
crateDef.description: ThingDef used for the placed crate.

thingSetMaker.label: Thing set maker
thingSetMaker.description: ThingSetMakerDef used to generate the crate's loot contents.

rotations.label: Rotations
rotations.description: Allowed placement rotations for the crate as rotation flags.

triggerThreatSignal.label: Trigger threat signal
triggerThreatSignal.description: Whether opening this crate triggers a threat signal.
